query:
SELECT a.*, e.nome as estabelecimento
FROM arquivos a
JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE e.nome = 'Maternidade Ela'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT a.*, e.nome as estabelecimento
